nodes.label: graphify query <question> command
nodes.rationale: First step for codebase questions when graphify-out/graph.json exists; returns a scoped subgraph, usually much smaller than GRAPH_REPORT.md or raw grep output.

nodes.label: graphify path <A> <B> command
nodes.rationale: Used for surfacing relationships between two named entities; returns a scoped subgraph rather than full report or grep output.

nodes.label: graphify explain <concept> command
nodes.rationale: Used for focused concept explanations; returns a scoped subgraph rather than full report or grep output.

nodes.label: graphify update . command
nodes.rationale: Run after modifying code to keep the graph current; AST-only extraction, no API cost.
